“You’re nothing but a pack of cards!”
and came flying down upon her:
with her head in the lap
from the trees upon her face.
as well as she could remember
them, all these strange Adventures of hers
that you have just been reading about;
and the bright eager eyes were looking up
the very tones of her voice,
that queer little toss of her head
once more the shriek of the Gryphon,
the squeaking of the Lizard’s slate-pencil,
rippling to the waving of the reeds—
to the voice of the shepherd boy—
and all the other queer noises,
to the confused clamour of the busy farm-yard—
while the lowing of the cattle
of the Mock Turtle’s heavy sobs.
how this same little sister of hers would,
the simple and loving heart of her childhood:
a pleasure in all their simple joys,
